title: glyceria distans subsp. conferta
intro: Glyceria distans subsp. conferta, also known as Fringed Mannagrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glyceria distans subsp. conferta include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues.
